title: Immortal Snail
description: This is a simple Minecraft mod that adds the mischievous immortal snail that will chase you for eternity with the goal of killing you permanently.
body:
The Immortal Snail

An ancient curse awakens in the depths of your new Minecraft world. The first time it enters your world or server, the immortal snail will spawn and begin its relentless pursuit. This snail is no mean creature—it’s slow, but it’ll never leave your back or other players’ backs until it claims its kill. Once it affects you, there is no escape, your death will be permanent. Will you survive his relentless hunt, or succumb to the curse? No matter where you go, the immortal snail will find you.

Get ready for the ultimate game of cat and mouse—only this time the mouse never escapes.
